ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "wap" REAL /* Weighted Average Price (WAP) of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the closing price compared to the previous day */,
  "no_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "no_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed */,
  "total_turnover" TEXT /* Total turnover in rupees */,
  "spread_high_low" REAL /* Spread between the highest and lowest prices */,
  "spread_close_open" REAL /* Spread between the closing and opening prices */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock on that particular day */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the stocks table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector the company belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock details */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the stocks table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the users table */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the trade in rupees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
